name: part_005
file: tmp_【#Myth5years】hololive English -Myth- 5th Anniversary Concert： Fortune Spinner [HT_HUFi8DJ4]_gemini-3-flash-preview/reencoded/part_005.mov

scenes.description: Takanashi Kiara and Ninomae Ina'nis perform 'caramel ribbon cursetard'.
MC section with Kiara, Ina, and Calliope Mori.

subtitles.original:
あぁしたい　こうしたい　どうしたい？
まだ出し惜しみみたい
subtitles.english:
I want to do this, I want to do that, what do you want to do?
Seems like you're still holding back

subtitles.original:
石の上にも残念
でもそんなんじゃええ塩梅　サキュレーション
subtitles.english:
Three years on a stone, it's regrettable
But that's a good seasoning circulation

subtitles.original:
ずっとまどろむ　ストーリーテラー
掌の上の様な　エモーション
subtitles.english:
A storyteller dozing forever
Emotions like on the palm of a hand

subtitles.original:
カラカラ　飛び出し　いい気味だなって
君は決め顔で　せーのっ！
subtitles.english:
Rattling, popping out, thinking "serves you right"
You say with a smug face, "Ready, go!"

subtitles.original: 永遠を願った夢に　終わりを告げる朝がきた
subtitles.english:
To the dream that wished for eternity
The morning that signals the end has come

subtitles.original:
嘘吐き　零れ落ちた　その涙
見つめ、見つめ、見つけた心
subtitles.english:
Liar, those tears that spilled over
Staring, staring, and found the heart

subtitles.original: 甘く　ほろ苦い　カラメルのように
subtitles.english: Sweet and bittersweet, like caramel

subtitles.original: 絡まるリボンは　呪いの鎧　だけど
subtitles.english: The tangled ribbon is armor of a curse, but

subtitles.original: この気持ちは　そう この気持ちにしか
subtitles.english: This feeling is, yeah, only to this feeling

subtitles.original: きっとならないから
subtitles.english: It surely won't become anything else

subtitles.original:
君と手と手繋いで
ひとつ　ひとつ　叶えていこう
subtitles.english:
Holding hands with you
Let's fulfill them one by one

subtitles.original: 僕らの物語は　今日も続く　約束
subtitles.english: Our story continues today, a promise

subtitles.original:
色とりどりの　真っ黒な歴史
愛おしい　私の歴史
subtitles.english:
Multicolored pitch black history
My dear history

subtitles.original:
誰も知らない　真っ白なページ
更新していく
subtitles.english:
Unknown to anyone, a pure white page
We'll keep updating it

subtitles.original: 話したくない　綻びは
subtitles.english: The flaws I don't want to talk about

subtitles.original: 話したくない　喜びで
subtitles.english: With the joys I don't want to let go of

subtitles.original: 接ぎ接ぎだらけのこの心
subtitles.english: This heart full of patches

subtitles.original: 償い　紡ぎ　繋いだところ
subtitles.english: Where I compensated, spun, and connected

subtitles.original:
憧れ　焦がれ　愛し焦がれ
全部、全部、全部、全部！
subtitles.english:
Longing, burning, burning with love
Everything, everything, everything, everything!

subtitles.original:
プリンのように　ひっくり返して
カラメル　キャラメル　My all favor
subtitles.english:
Like a pudding, flip it over
Caramel, caramel, My all favor

subtitles.original: いたい　いたい　ここいたい
subtitles.english: Ouch, ouch, it hurts here / I want to be here

subtitles.original: 聴き流したままで　パズルのピース
subtitles.english: Just let it slide, a puzzle piece

subtitles.original:
でもそんなんじゃやだ！ でもそんなんじゃダメ！
僕ら決め顔で　せーのっ！
subtitles.english:
But I don't want that! But that's no good!
We say with a smug face, "Ready, go!"

subtitles.original: 次の切り札は　自分で選ぶの
subtitles.english: The next trump card, I'll choose it myself

subtitles.original: 運命の赤い　リボンを手繰り寄せて
subtitles.english: Pulling the red ribbon of destiny close

subtitles.original: この気持ちは　そう この気持ちにしか
subtitles.english: This feeling is, yeah, only to this feeling

subtitles.original: きっとならないから
subtitles.english: It surely won't become anything else

subtitles.original:
君と手と手繋いで
ひとつ　ひとつ　叶えていこう
subtitles.english:
Holding hands with you
Let's fulfill them one by one

subtitles.original: 僕らの物語は　今日も続く　約束
subtitles.english: Our story continues today, a promise

subtitles.original:
色とりどりに　真っ黒な歴史
愛おしい　僕らの歴史
subtitles.english:
In many colors, pitch black history
Our dear history

subtitles.original:
残さず食べて　全部糧にして
更新していく
subtitles.english:
Eat it all up, make it all nourishment
We'll keep updating it
